title: QA Runtime ODD Monitor FAIL — documents the bad-orbit-class-label failure mode that ODD_DECL is designed to catch
_fixture_purpose: Documented FAIL fixture (well-formed under the schema). Demonstrates the failure mode that ODD_DECL is designed to catch: a fixture declaring an ODD that contains a label not in the canonical orbit-class set {singularity, satellite, cosmos}. The body fields below intentionally encode the wrong claim so a reviewer can see what the ODD_DECL gate would have flagged. Mirrors cert [194] csm_fail_wrong_agency.json convention.

fail_ledger.message: Deliberately wrong: declared_odd contains 'totally_invalid_orbit_class' and 'yet_another_invalid' which are not in the canonical orbit-class set {singularity, satellite, cosmos}. If result were not FAIL, the validator would emit: 'ODD_DECL: declared_odd entry totally_invalid_orbit_class not in (singularity, satellite, cosmos)' and similar for the other invalid label.
